# text

**Instance Property**

The raw unformatted string for the text element.

## Declaration

```swift
var text: String { get }
```

## Describing a Text Element

- **attributedText**: The stylized attributed string for the text element as presented to the user in Photos.
- **textElementType**: The enumerated type of the text element.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType**: An enumeration of the type of text element.
